info.name: DNS SaaS Service Detection
author: noah @thesubtlety
pdteam
info.description: A CNAME DNS record was discovered

request:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 2846
;; flags: rd; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 0, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 4096

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;benefriches.ademe.fr.	IN	 CNAME
response:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 2846
;; flags: qr rd ra; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 1, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 1232

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;benefriches.ademe.fr.	IN	 CNAME

;; ANSWER SECTION:
benefriches.ademe.fr.	300	IN	CNAME	benefriches-production.osc-secnum-fr1.scalingo.io.

info.name: CAA Record
author: pdteam
info.description: A CAA record was discovered. A CAA record is used to specify which certificate authorities (CAs) are allowed to issue certificates for a domain.

request:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 7071
;; flags: rd; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 0, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 4096

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;benefriches.ademe.fr.	IN	 CAA
response:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 7071
;; flags: qr rd ra; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 2, AUTHORITY: 1, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 1232

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;benefriches.ademe.fr.	IN	 CAA

;; ANSWER SECTION:
benefriches.ademe.fr.	300	IN	CNAME	benefriches-production.osc-secnum-fr1.scalingo.io.
benefriches-production.osc-secnum-fr1.scalingo.io.	300	IN	CNAME	lb-pool-main.shard-0.osc-secnum-fr1.scalingo-network.com.

;; AUTHORITY SECTION:
scalingo-network.com.	1800	IN	SOA	burt.ns.cloudflare.com. dns.cloudflare.com. 2400917324 10000 2400 604800 1800

info.name: Content-Security-Policy "script-src" Wildcard Detected
author: pussycat0x
info.description: Detected a wildcard (*) within the script-src directive of the Content-Security-Policy. This allowed scripts to load from any origin, weakening the CSP and increasing XSS risk.

request:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: benefriches.ademe.fr
User-Agent: Nuclei - Open-source project (github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei)
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
response: HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: close Transfer-Encoding: chunked Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://tally.so/widgets/embed.js https://stats.beta.gouv.fr https://*.crisp.chat; connect-src 'self' data: https://stats.beta.gouv.fr/matomo.php https://data.geopf.fr/geocodage/search/ https://geo.api.gouv.fr/communes/ https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/twemoji/ https://mutafriches.beta.gouv.fr https://*.crisp.chat wss://*.relay.crisp.chat wss://*.relay.rescue.crisp.chat; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.crisp.chat; font-src 'self' https://*.crisp.chat; img-src 'self' blob: data: https://*.crisp.chat; worker-src blob: https://*.crisp.chat; frame-ancestors 'none'; frame-src https://tally.so https://benefriches-metabase.osc-secnum-fr1.scalingo.io https://mutafriches.beta.gouv.fr; Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Date: Sun, 19 Apr 2026 05:33:36 GMT Etag: W/"69dd14da-5ad" Last-Modified: Mon, 13 Apr 2026 16:07:54 GMT Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000 Vary: Accept-Encoding X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Request-Id: 18a1f43e-389c-4c2f-9b1d-ff5c00510281 Bénéfriches, l'outil qui calcule la valeur réelle de votre projet d'aménagement

info.name: Weak Content Security Policy - Detect
author: pussycat0x
celbahraoui
info.description: Detected misconfigured CSP directives containing unsafe and overly permissive keywords that weakened resource loading restrictions. This configuration allowed high-risk script behaviors, resulting in reduced protection against XSS attacks.

extracted-results: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://tally.so/widgets/embed.js https://stats.beta.gouv.fr https://*.crisp.chat; connect-src 'self' data: https://stats.beta.gouv.fr/matomo.php https://data.geopf.fr/geocodage/search/ https://geo.api.gouv.fr/communes/ https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/twemoji/ https://mutafriches.beta.gouv.fr https://*.crisp.chat wss://*.relay.crisp.chat wss://*.relay.rescue.crisp.chat; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.crisp.chat; font-src 'self' https://*.crisp.chat; img-src 'self' blob: data: https://*.crisp.chat; worker-src blob: https://*.crisp.chat; frame-ancestors 'none'; frame-src https://tally.so https://benefriches-metabase.osc-secnum-fr1.scalingo.io https://mutafriches.beta.gouv.fr;

info.name: Detect SSL Certificate Issuer
author: lingtren
info.description: Extract the issuer's organization from the target's certificate. Issuers are entities which sign and distribute certificates.

info.name: SSL DNS Names
author: pdteam
info.description: Extract the Subject Alternative Name (SAN) from the target's certificate. SAN facilitates the usage of additional hostnames with the same certificate.

info.name: TLS Version - Detect
author: pdteam
pussycat0x
info.description:
TLS version detection is a security process used to determine the version of the Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol used by a computer or server.
It is important to detect the TLS version in order to ensure secure communication between two computers or servers.

info.name: TLS Version - Detect
author: pdteam
pussycat0x
info.description:
TLS version detection is a security process used to determine the version of the Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol used by a computer or server.
It is important to detect the TLS version in order to ensure secure communication between two computers or servers.
